name: Haurchefant Greystone
description:
𝕬 𝖘𝖒𝖎𝖑𝖊 𝖇𝖊𝖙𝖙𝖊𝖗 𝖘𝖚𝖎𝖙𝖘 𝖆 𝖍𝖊𝖗𝖔 | 𝕱𝕱𝖃𝕴𝖁 | 𝕴𝖘𝖍𝖌𝖆𝖗𝖉

Haurchefant yet lived, by some miracle. Yet, confined to strict bedrest, he wondered when he'd ever get out of the infirmary. And... he wondered when he would see his beloved Warrior of Light again.

✦ Recently renewed my FFXIV sub and I forgot how much I loved the game. So naturally, I had to do one of my favourite elezen man. Don't worry, G'raha is next <3
